{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "saamsuz", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/184284254?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/saamsuz", "id": 184284254, "login": "saamsuz", "node_id": "U_kgDOCvv0Xg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/saamsuz", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45543", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-552"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-552", "name": "Files or Directories Accessible to External Parties"}], "description": "### Impact

A removed collaborator retains unauthorized read access to uploaded respondent files for the affected form. The scope is limited to uploaded files for forms where that user previously had results access.

### Patches

<!-- Adjust component name and version. "Nextcloud Enterprise" is only needed for Server and shipped apps -->

It is recommended that the Nextcloud forms app is upgraded to 5.2.7

### Workarounds

* Disable app Forms

### References

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3617352)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/forms/pull/3291)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q4fw-6jf8-5vhh", "html_url": "https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-q4fw-6jf8-5vhh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q4fw-6jf8-5vhh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45543"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-13T06:48:32Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84044328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DorraJaouad", "id": 84044328, "login": "DorraJaouad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDQ0MzI4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Deleting a Forms collaborator share leaves uploaded response files accessible through a lingering Files share", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T06:48:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nextcloud/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-q4fw-6jf8-5vhh", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "nextcloud", "name": "Forms"}, "patched_versions": "5.2.7", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">=4.3.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Deleting a Forms collaborator share leaves uploaded response files accessible through a lingering Files share
